---
id: cache-item-delete
title: "Delete a key-value cache item"
description: "Deletes a key-value cache item. Deleted cache items are no longer accessible and cannot be restored."
sidebar_label: "Delete a key-value cache item"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete a key-value cache item"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/cache-items/{cache-item-id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Deletes a key-value cache item. Deleted cache items are no longer accessible and cannot be restored.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
